chunks.title: Woe to the Complacent in Zion and Samaria
chunks.reason: A unified oracle of judgment against the wealthy elite who ignore the coming calamity.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Oath and the Death in the House
chunks.reason: A divine oath followed by a vivid narrative illustration of total family destruction.

chunks.title: The Absurdity of Israel's Pride and Justice
chunks.reason: An argument using rhetorical questions to contrast natural order with Israel's social inversion and impending invasion.
